wiring.principle: Every frontend model maps to a primitive function, every primitive maps to a sovereign SDK module, every SDK enforces architectural laws, and every law traces back to the organism
phases: Phase 1 — Recognize: Name the model and its intelligence type
Phase 3 — Rebuild sovereignly: Build sovereign renderer/router/state kernel/scene system/interface organism/visual proof engine
Phase 4 — Reinsert into organism: Wire into doctrine/mechanism/runtime truth/company/organism/IP/counsel
